title: Declarative API Validation — +k8s:eachKey
text:
Description:
Declares a validation for each key in a map.
Stability Level:
Alpha
Payload:
<validation-tag>
: The tag to evaluate for each key.
Usage Example:
type
MyStruct
struct
{
// +k8s:eachKey=+k8s:minimum=1
MyMap
map
[
int
]
string
`json:"myMap"`
}
In this example,
eachKey
is used to specify that the
+k8s:minimum
tag should be applied to each
int
key in
MyMap
. This means that all keys in the map must be >= 1.
